steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: Left of blank: preposition “of” expecting a noun phrase as its object. Right of blank: noun “protagonist” followed by a comma and appositive. The blank contains a noun phrase with modifiers and a possessive form.

steps.title: Apply number agreement
steps.content:
Agreement in number: possessives and nouns must match the singular or plural nature of what they refer to.

The singular novel requires “the novel's” and the plural poems require “poems” — making choice A correct.

Choices B–C use “poem's” (singular possessive instead of plural noun), and C–D use “novels'” (plural possessive instead of singular).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
